docket_entries.description: ORDER (SC-152) ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL. THE REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL IS APPROVED.

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-15-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Patrick Mora, Appellant/Defendant In Pro Per
Abdol Chalak, Respondent/Plaintiff In Pro Per

Witnesses: Ali M. Chalak & Esther Cristina Elizalde

This cause comes on regulary for trial de novo. Court and parties are present as note above.
The parties present their respective cases by testimony and documentary evidence under oath.
At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Evidence is retained.

JPT Diana Kruze, Clerk C. Banayad, not reported (526)
